dialogos.texto_en: Ohh! There are quite alot of shops lined up!
And it's bustling with so many people!
Kokusai dori is the busiest street in Naha.\nLocal people must come to shop here too, right?
There are not only shops on the main street,\nbut also many in the backstreets.
I wonder how many shops there are\nif we include the ones in the backstreets?
There are definitely too many to go around all of them.
So, what should we do?\nWe should decide on souvenirs soon.
Let's each go where we want to, freely.\nWalking around in a group seems difficult.
Yeah, that's right.
I have a shop I'm interested in, so I'll go on ahead.
(If that's the case...\n I'll make time to talk to Miku while she's gone.)
(I need to figure out why Miku is avoiding me%p-2;――\n%p; We need to confirm each other's feelings for sure.\n Everything else can wait!)
Hey, Miku, which shop are you going to?
Ah, umm...\nI think I'll choose a souvenir for Dad.
What do you think would be good?\nSomething like a small item\nhe could use for work, maybe?
Hey, Miku.
!...\nWh-what?
I wanna talk to you for a bit.\nCan you spare me some time?
Huh?!\nU-um, Futaro?
No good?
I-it's not that.\nI was thinking... I was thinking of having to talk to you too.
I see, good.
(First step, check.\n Now to think about what to do\n if she runs away now%p-2;――%p;)
(No, I can't let my guard down.\n Put aside any ulterior motives!\n Make sure to act with sincerity and seriousness!)
Wha...\nFutaro, what's wrong?
What are you talking about?
W-well, I just feel you're mad...
I'm not angry or anything.\nI just want to have a serious talk with you.
Wha-wha-whaaa?!
Um, Futaro.\nI, um! Sorry!
Huh...
(Damn it! Why is she running away?\n Is there another reason why Miku is avoiding me?!)
(No, I need to confirm that!\n Time to find Miku!)
